home.title: Home
home.subtitle: What Cairn knows about you, and what it just learned.
home.no_activity: no activity yet — capture your first note from the extension or {hotkey}.

banner.title: No AI provider configured
banner.body_prefix: Capture + full-text search work without any AI key. To get structured entities, themes, and vector search, pick a provider in
banner.body_suffix: — OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Vercel Gateway, OpenRouter, 豆包, Kimi, GLM, Qwen, MiniMax all supported.

entities.title: Top of mind
entities.subtitle: People, projects, places, beliefs — sorted by how much they matter right now.
entities.no_entities: no entities yet — they appear as you capture more notes.

dedup_banner.title: {n} possible duplicates
dedup_banner.subtitle: review and merge to keep things clean

search.title: Search
search.placeholder: Search by name, content, or tag…
search.examples: Try a name, a topic, or a phrase you remember.

themes.title: Themes
themes.subtitle: Semantic memories — LLM-consolidated summaries of recurring topics across your episodic memory. Refreshed by the background worker; can be triggered manually.
themes.no_themes: no themes yet. capture several related notes (people, preferences, goals) and click

agents.title: Agents
agents.empty: no agents yet. click {action} to register one.

import.title: Import
import.subtitle: Bring in memory from Claude / Cursor / Codex / CLAUDE.md.
import.no_sources: No memory files found in known paths.

usage.title: Usage
usage.subtitle: Tokens + dollars per call, last 90 days.
usage.empty: no usage rows yet — set an AI provider in Settings and capture a note.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Identity keys, extraction model, providers — and where your data lives.

language.description: Locale for the Cairn window and migration dialogs. Browser extension follows in a later release.

identity.title: Identity
identity.sub: Your ed25519 keypair · public key signs every audit entry

extraction.title: Extraction
extraction.sub: Where entities and embeddings get computed. Leave both unset for BM25-only mode.

selection.title: Selection popover
selection.sub: Highlight text in any app → a Cairn pill appears with one-click save. macOS only.

mcp.title: Remote MCP bridge
mcp.sub: Expose Cairn's MCP server over localhost HTTP/SSE for tunnel-based clients.
mcp.tunnel_hint_prefix: Expose the local port with a tunnel:
mcp.connector_hint: In ChatGPT → New connector: URL = https://<tunnel>/sse, Auth = No authentication. The tunnel URL is the secret.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.sub: Vacuum orphan vector rows + SQLite VACUUM (shrinks disk).
maintenance.report_template: Scanned {before} vec rows; deleted {deleted} orphans (+{meta} meta).

capture.title: Capture sources
capture.sub: Background pollers that feed your memory.

escape.title: Escape hatch — export everything
escape.sub: Your data is always yours. One click → a human-readable Markdown bundle, signed by audit-chain timestamp.

connectors.section_sub: Copy-paste snippets to wire each MCP host into Cairn. Status dots come from the agents table — green if the host has talked to Cairn in the last 5 minutes.
connectors.web_path: Add as "Custom Connector" in the host UI. Auth = None.
connectors.web_extra: Needs a public tunnel — turn on Remote MCP bridge above, run `cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:7717`, then replace <your-tunnel> with the tunnel domain.
